tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests' ORDER BY ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT p.number AS pr_number, p.closes_linear AS linear_id
FROM github_pull_requests p
JOIN linear_issues l ON p.closes_linear = l.id
WHERE p.state = 'merged'
  AND l.state != 'done';"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) AS merged_pr_count
FROM github_pull_requests p
JOIN linear_issues l ON p.closes_linear = l.id
WHERE p.state = 'merged'
  AND l.state != 'done';"}
